positive: Minimalist geometric celestial scene, featuring stylized constellations forming abstract animal shapes (such as a crescent moon wolf or a soaring phoenix), set against a gradient cosmic background of deep sapphire blue and nebula purple. The elements should utilize strong, thick white and gold lines to create a high-contrast silhouette effect. Composition must be centered, designed to wrap around a printed garment, focusing on negative space and elegant symmetry. Use dot work and clean line art to enhance the cosmic feel. Graphic novel style, vector illustration quality, highly detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, dirty, grunge, low detail, noise, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realistic, messy
